company.name: PTC Logistics
company.tagline: Pan India Transport. Global Logistics Solutions.
company.description: PTC Logistics provides reliable and efficient freight services through Air, Road, and Sea transportation. With a strong logistics network, we ensure safe, timely, and cost-effective delivery of goods across India and international destinations.
company.address: PTC Logistics Pvt. Ltd., Office No. 204, Logistics Hub, Virar East, Mumbai - 400069, Maharashtra, India

whyUs.title: Pan India Road Network
whyUs.description: Extensive transport network covering all major cities, industrial zones, ports, and warehouses across India.

whyUs.title: Fast & Reliable
whyUs.description: Committed to on-time delivery with real-time tracking and professional logistics support.

whyUs.title: Competitive Pricing
whyUs.description: Cost-effective logistics solutions tailored to your business needs without compromising on quality.

whyUs.title: Safe Cargo Handling
whyUs.description: Trained professionals ensure your cargo is handled with utmost care from pickup to delivery.

whyUs.title: Global Reach
whyUs.description: International air and sea freight solutions connecting India to global trade destinations.

whyUs.title: Expert Documentation
whyUs.description: Complete assistance with shipping documentation, customs clearance, and freight forwarding.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Mehta
testimonials.text: PTC Logistics has been our trusted partner for over 5 years. Their Pan India road transport is exceptionally reliable and the team is always responsive to our needs.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: We use their air freight and sea freight services for international shipments. The documentation support and timely delivery have helped us grow our export business significantly.

testimonials.name: Amit Patel
testimonials.text: Efficient, professional, and cost-effective. PTC Logistics handles all our FTL requirements across India. Highly recommend for industrial cargo transport.
